text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking through the hallway, I encounter
Mejiro Bright holding a cleaning cloth and
looking full of enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Time to scrub-a-dub the floor till it's
squeaky clean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Scrub-a-dub-dub...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swiiiish... Swiiiish...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Phew. It's hard to make much progress using a wet
cloth. Perhaps I should quicken my pace a little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swiiiish... Swiii—CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Sorry for worrying you. My foot just
slipped, is all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's barely wiped anything down. At this rate,
she'll be here all day before she finishes.
choice_data_list: Would you like me to help?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! Hehe... Thank you so much for your kind
offer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: But I can finish this work on my own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I may be clumsy, but I can't simply give up
whenever I hit the slightest bit of resistance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Time to brush myself off and continue. I'd like to
figure out what the trick to doing this right is.
choice_data_list: Just be careful not to hurt yourself.
Just be careful not to hurt yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Time to brush myself off and continue. I'd like to
figure out what the trick to doing this right is.
choice_data_list: Just be careful not to hurt yourself.
Just be careful not to hurt yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I feel even more motivated thanks to
your words of encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Time to get back to work. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swiiiish... Swiiiish...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for worrying about me. You're right.
Getting injured would keep me from being able
to run in my races, and that wouldn't do at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'll be extra careful as I work. Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swiiiish... Swiiiish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I walk by the same hallway and
find it sparkling clean!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. You're the same trainer from before.
Watch your feet, please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Scrubbity dubbity...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike before, where she was cleaning the floor
inch by painful inch, Mejiro Bright now flies down
the hall with her cleaning cloth!
choice_data_list:
Have you been practicing cleaning the floor this
whole time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I asked to be put in charge of wiping the
floor every day. I've been honing my skills little
by little by polishing the floors in the dorm, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've finally gotten the hang of it, but I still need
to devote more of myself to this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Since I've come this far, I figured I might as well
aim to become a floor-wiping specialist. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The polished hallway floor gleams in the twilight
glow from the windows as Mejiro Bright declares
her goal.
